title: agrostula truncatula subsp. truncatula
intro: Agrostula truncatula subsp. truncatula, also known as the button grass, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Polytrichaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its antiviral and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
